Comfort - Air conditioning, daily housekeeping, and heating

Non-Smoking, renovated in May 2016

258-sq-foot room with city views


Relax - In-room massage available

Internet - Free WiFi 25+ Mbps and wired internet access

Food & Drink - Refrigerator, electric kettle, room service (limited hours), and free bottled water

Bathroom - Shower/tub combination, slippers, and free toiletries

Practical - Desk, safe, and phone

Comfort - Air conditioning, daily housekeeping, and heating

Non-Smoking

258-sq-foot room with city views


Relax - In-room massage available

Comfort - Air conditioning, daily housekeeping, and heating

Non-Smoking, renovated in May 2016
